subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Friendship doth make easy for man every difficulty. These farmers now, with such hardship, with life so arduous, for them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الفت از برای انسان هر مشکلی را آسان می کند.  این فلاح ها حال به این مشکلی، زندگانی به این سختی، برای اینها
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @service to others; to the Cause of God
